query_strategy: Multiple YouTube search.list requests, each targeting a specific media intent.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find explanatory video, documentary context, archival footage, or scene history.
query_candidates.q: DJ Kool Herc 1520 Sedgwick Avenue 1973 hip hop origins documentary

request_params.q: DJ Kool Herc 1520 Sedgwick Avenue 1973 hip hop origins documentary

query_candidates.reason: The event is a canonical origin-story moment with named artist, venue, year, and place.
review_risks: Check that results are historically grounded and not generic hip-hop recap videos.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find artist, DJ, producer, venue, or oral-history interview material.
query_candidates.reason: DJ Kool Herc is an explicit interview subject and the year anchors the query.
review_risks: Verify that the interview discusses early Bronx parties or the 1973 origin narrative.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find context about a relevant venue, club, block, park, neighborhood, or performance space.
query_candidates.q: 1520 Sedgwick Avenue hip hop birthplace 1973 documentary

request_params.q: 1520 Sedgwick Avenue hip hop birthplace 1973 documentary

query_candidates.reason: The event is tied to a specific building and community room.
review_risks: Reject tourism-style clips that do not add useful historical or musical context.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a DJ set, break mix, party mix, turntablism demonstration, or historically framed mix.
query_candidates.q: DJ Kool Herc Bronx breaks party DJ mix 1973

request_params.q: DJ Kool Herc Bronx breaks party DJ mix 1973

query_candidates.reason: A DJ mix can help represent the sound-world of breaks and party practice around the event.
review_risks: Use only as sound context; do not imply it documents the exact party.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find a YouTube playlist, mix, or curated song collection that matches the event context.
query_candidates.q: DJ Kool Herc early hip hop breaks Bronx party playlist 1973

request_params.q: DJ Kool Herc early hip hop breaks Bronx party playlist 1973

query_candidates.reason: A playlist can support listening context for the breaks associated with early Kool Herc parties.
review_risks: Check for historically plausible selections and avoid unrelated modern playlists.

query_candidates.media_goal: Find context about a named historical event, scene shift, cultural moment, or local history.
query_candidates.q: August 11 1973 Kool Herc back to school jam hip hop history

request_params.q: August 11 1973 Kool Herc back to school jam hip hop history

query_candidates.reason: The event is framed as a symbolic historical origin point.
review_risks: Check that the result distinguishes later canonization from direct historical evidence.

omitted_intents.reason: The event does not name one specific recording.

review_notes: Check whether results are historically relevant before adding links.
Reject YouTube Shorts, reaction shorts, teaser clips, and unrelated short-form uploads.
Keep all automatically found links as draft until editorial review.
Verify channel/source quality before promoting any media link to reviewed.
